episodes.title: Om Birla Vs Rahul Gandhi, Oppn's Epstein Attack at Hardeep Puri & Oil Crisis Protest
episodes.description:
On day 4 of Parliament's Budget Session, Speaker Om Birla returned to the Lok Sabha amid protests against Prime Minister Narendra Modi accusing him of panicking in a crisis situation. A face-off triggered in Lok Sabha with Birla pulling up Rahul for breaking the rules.

episodes.title: 'Oil Minister Has Friend Epstein': LoP Rahul Gandhi Attacks Hardeep Puri | Oil Crisis
episodes.description:
During the Budget Session in Lok Sabha, Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi brought up Epstein in his speech, accusing Oil Minister Hardeep Singh Puri of being friends with him.
